summary: Iteration 2 testing PASSED. Backend: all 7 pytest cases green (payment_type/sent_to fields, is_deposit sync, rent_history push on rent change with no-op ignore, dues_notes PATCH incl 404). Frontend E2E: TenantDetail edit-tenant dialog opens, changing rent shows warning banner and appends 2 entries to rent-history-card (10000->12000->13500 with '↑ Increased' badges); dues-notes-input persists across reload with save-dues-notes-btn correctly disabled when unchanged; record-payment dialog Custom + sent_to='HDFC UPI' saves and history displays 'Custom' badge + 'Sent to: HDFC UPI'; global Payments page dialog exposes global-payment-type / global-payment-sentto / global-payment-date and table renders Custom badge + 'HDFC UPI' under method. All required data-testids present.

issues: Benign 'ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications' warning surfaces as a red CRA dev-error overlay (originating from Recharts). Not a bug; hidden in production build but intercepts pointer events in preview. Consider a small window.addEventListener('error') swallow for that specific message.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py update_tenant: rent_history push happens in a separate update from $set of payload; slight race, but fine for single-user rental app. Could combine into one update_one with $push + $set for atomicity.
Frontend Payments.jsx global dialog: 'Method' select trigger has no data-testid (only payment-type has one). Minor test coverage gap.

TenantDetail.jsx: When payment_type toggles to 'deposit', month input is disabled but the value remains a real month; backend still stores it. Acceptable since is_deposit=true excludes it from monthly filters.
dues_notes field default '' on legacy tenants: get_tenant uses setdefault so responses stay backwards compatible - good.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on critical flows (rent history, dues notes, custom payment with sent_to, global dialog testids)

seed_data_creation: Ephemeral TEST_ prefixed building+tenant created and cleaned up in fixtures and E2E script.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers payment_type/sent_to/is_deposit sync, rent_history append (2 changes + no-op), dues_notes PATCH + 404. Uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend .env fallback. For Radix Select options in Playwright use page.get_by_role('option', name='...') (avoid text= which matches hidden native <option>). Recharts ResizeObserver warning shows a CRA error overlay in preview which can intercept clicks after chart renders.
